memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_discover_mcs_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_discover_mcs_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when a media control server is discovered

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_player_name_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, const char *name)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_player_name_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the player name is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
Player name

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_icon_obj_id_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint64_t icon_id)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_icon_obj_id_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the icon object ID is read

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The ID of the Icon Object. This is a UINT48 in a uint64_t

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_icon_url_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, const char *icon_url)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_icon_url_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the icon URL is read

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The URL of the Icon

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_track_changed_ntf_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_track_changed_ntf_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for track changed notifications.

detaileddescription.para: Called when a track change is notified.
The track changed characteristic is a special case. It can not be read or set, it can only be notified.

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_track_title_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, const char *title)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_track_title_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the track title is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The title of the track

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_track_duration_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, int32_t dur)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_track_duration_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the track duration is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The duration of the track

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_track_position_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, int32_t pos)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_track_position_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the track position is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Track Position

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_set_track_position_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, int32_t pos)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_track_position_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the track position is set

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Track Position set (or attempted to set)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_playback_speed_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, int8_t speed)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_playback_speed_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the playback speed is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Playback Speed

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_set_playback_speed_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, int8_t speed)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_playback_speed_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the playback speed is set

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Playback Speed set (or attempted to set)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_seeking_speed_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, int8_t speed)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_seeking_speed_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the seeking speed is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Seeking Speed

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_segments_obj_id_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_segments_obj_id_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the track segments object ID is read

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Track Segments Object ID (UINT48)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_current_track_obj_id_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_current_track_obj_id_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the current track object ID is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Current Track Object ID (UINT48)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_set_current_track_obj_id_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_current_track_obj_id_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the current track object ID is set

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Object ID (UINT48) set (or attempted to set)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_next_track_obj_id_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_next_track_obj_id_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the next track object ID is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Next Track Object ID (UINT48)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_set_next_track_obj_id_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_next_track_obj_id_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the next track object ID is set

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Object ID (UINT48) set (or attempted to set)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_parent_group_obj_id_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_parent_group_obj_id_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the parent group object ID is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Parent Group Object ID (UINT48)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_current_group_obj_id_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_current_group_obj_id_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the current group object ID is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Current Group Object ID (UINT48)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_set_current_group_obj_id_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint64_t obj_id)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_current_group_obj_id_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the current group object ID is set

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Object ID (UINT48) set (or attempted to set)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_playing_order_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t order)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_playing_order_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the playing order is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The playback order

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_set_playing_order_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t order)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_playing_order_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the playing order is set

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Playing Order set (or attempted to set)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_playing_orders_supported_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint16_t orders)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_playing_orders_supported_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the supported playing orders are read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The playing orders supported (bitmap)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_media_state_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t state)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_media_state_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the media state is read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Media State

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_send_cmd_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, const struct mpl_cmd *cmd)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_conn *conn, int err, const struct mpl_cmd *cmd)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_send_cmd_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when a command is sent, i.e. when the media control point is set

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The command sent

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_cmd_ntf_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, const struct mpl_cmd_ntf *ntf)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_conn *conn, int err, const struct mpl_cmd_ntf *ntf)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_cmd_ntf_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the media control point is notified
Notifications for commands (i.e. for writes to the media control point) use a different parameter structure than what is used for sending commands (writing to the media control point)

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The command notification

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_opcodes_supported_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint32_t opcodes)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_opcodes_supported_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the supported opcodes (commands) are read or notified

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The supported opcodes

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_send_search_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, const struct mpl_search *search)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_conn *conn, int err, const struct mpl_search *search)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_send_search_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when a search is sent, i.e. when the search control point is set

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The search set (or attempted to set)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_search_ntf_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t result_code)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_search_ntf_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the search control point is notified
Notifications for searches (i.e. for writes to the search control point) use a different parameter structure than what is used for sending searches (writing to the search control point)

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The search notification

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_search_results_obj_id_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint64_t id)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_search_results_obj_id_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the search results object ID is read or notified
Note that the Search Results Object ID value may be zero, in case the characteristic does not exist on the server. (This will be the case if there has not been a successful search.)

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Search Results Object ID (UINT48)

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_read_content_control_id_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t ccid)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_content_control_id_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the content control ID is read

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
The Content Control ID

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_otc_obj_selected_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_obj_selected_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when an object is selected

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_otc_obj_metadata_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_obj_metadata_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when object metadata is read

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_otc_read_icon_object_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_icon_object_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the icon object is read

conn
The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
err
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
buf
Buffer containing the object contents
If err is EMSGSIZE, the object contents have been truncated.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_otc_read_track_segments_object_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_track_segments_object_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the track segments object is read

conn
The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
err
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
buf
Buffer containing the object contents
If err is EMSGSIZE, the object contents have been truncated.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_otc_read_current_track_object_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_current_track_object_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the current track object is read

conn
The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
err
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
buf
Buffer containing the object contents
If err is EMSGSIZE, the object contents have been truncated.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_otc_read_next_track_object_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_next_track_object_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the next track object is read

conn
The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
err
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
buf
Buffer containing the object contents
If err is EMSGSIZE, the object contents have been truncated.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_otc_read_parent_group_object_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_parent_group_object_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the parent group object is read

conn
The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
err
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
buf
Buffer containing the object contents
If err is EMSGSIZE, the object contents have been truncated.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_mcc_otc_read_current_group_object_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, struct net_buf_simple *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_current_group_object_cb

detaileddescription.para: Called when the current group object is read

conn
The connection that was used to initialise the media control client
err
Error value. 0 on success, GATT error or errno on fail
buf
Buffer containing the object contents
If err is EMSGSIZE, the object contents have been truncated.

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_init
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_init

parameterdescription.para: Callbacks to be used

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_discover_mcs
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_discover_mcs

detaileddescription.para: Discover Media Control Service (MCS) on the server given by the connection Optionally subscribe to notifications.
Shall be called once, after media control client initialization and before using other media control client functionality.

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device
Whether to subscribe to notifications

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_player_name
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_player_name

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_icon_obj_id
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_icon_obj_id

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_icon_url
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_icon_url

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_track_title
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_track_title

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_track_duration
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_track_duration

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_track_position
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_track_position

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_set_track_position
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_track_position

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device
Track position

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_playback_speed
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_playback_speed

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_set_playback_speed
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_playback_speed

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device
Playback speed

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_seeking_speed
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_seeking_speed

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_segments_obj_id
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_segments_obj_id

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_current_track_obj_id
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_current_track_obj_id

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_set_current_track_obj_id
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_current_track_obj_id

detaileddescription.para: Set the Current Track to the track given by the id parameter

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device
Object Transfer Service ID (UINT48) of the track to set as the current track

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_next_track_obj_id
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_next_track_obj_id

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_set_next_track_obj_id
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_next_track_obj_id

detaileddescription.para: Set the Next Track to the track given by the id parameter

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device
Object Transfer Service ID (UINT48) of the track to set as the next track

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_current_group_obj_id
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_current_group_obj_id

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_set_current_group_obj_id
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_current_group_obj_id

detaileddescription.para: Set the Current Group to the group given by the id parameter

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device
Object Transfer Service ID (UINT48) of the group to set as the current group

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_parent_group_obj_id
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_parent_group_obj_id

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_playing_order
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_playing_order

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_set_playing_order
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_set_playing_order

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device
Playing order

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_playing_orders_supported
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_playing_orders_supported

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_media_state
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_media_state

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_send_cmd
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_send_cmd

detaileddescription.para: Write a command (e.g. "play", "pause") to the server's media control point.

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device
The command to send

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_opcodes_supported
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_opcodes_supported

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_send_search
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_send_search

detaileddescription.para: Write a search to the server's search control point.

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device
The search

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_search_results_obj_id
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_search_results_obj_id

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_read_content_control_id
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_read_content_control_id

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_otc_read_object_metadata
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_object_metadata

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_otc_read_icon_object
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_icon_object

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_otc_read_track_segments_object
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_track_segments_object

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_otc_read_current_track_object
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_current_track_object

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_otc_read_next_track_object
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_next_track_object

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_otc_read_current_group_object
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_current_group_object

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: int bt_mcc_otc_read_parent_group_object
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_read_parent_group_object

parameterdescription.para: Connection to the peer device

memberdef.definition: struct bt_ots_client * bt_mcc_otc_inst
memberdef.name: bt_mcc_otc_inst

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the MCC server.

simplesect.para: Pointer to a MCC OTC instance if found else NULL.

detaileddescription.para: Updated to the Media Control Profile specification revision 1.0
